entries.name: Aqsa
entries.message: Happiest birthday Janice!! Happy 19th birthday to you! One of the reason a chose a message is because we definitely don’t have any decent pics together or the one we have is of my last day in school but needless to say it has been wonderful knowing you and being a friend of yours. Having the same interests with you has been so much fun. Hanging out with you is always fun as well because there’s never a dull moment! Thank you for being such an amazing and kind hearted friend, I can’t wait to make more memories together and lots of yapping! Before I end this message, my fav memory of us was watching the F1 movie together and going to the Gracie Abram’s, so here’s to praying we get to go to an F1 race and Gracie Abram’s concert!  Can’t wait for you to have an amazing birthday and for our bts concert hehe!!  Happy birthday and love you!!
